title: tylanthus eriophoros
intro: Tylanthus eriophoros, also known as "Wild Cucumber", is a perennial plant species that belongs to the family Celastraceae. The plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of Tylanthus eriophoros include relief from fever, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. The plant can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture for its herbal remedies, with the roots and leaves being the most commonly used parts.
